overall.description: First-person perspective walking steadily along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, showing dense woodland with a narrow dirt path winding through trees and undergrowth.

tall tree trunks forming a dense wall along the left side of the path
tall tree trunks and branches lining the right side of the trail

tall grass and shrubbery at the right edge of the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt forest path at night, illuminated by a flashlight that reveals the ground ahead while the surrounding woods remain in deep darkness. Tall trees and dense undergrowth flank both sides of the trail, creating an enclosed, intimate atmosphere with no other visible entities or structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a secluded forest trail that maintains a tense, claustrophobic atmosphere. It begins with the camera advancing steadily along a narrow dirt path, where a focused beam of light cuts through the oppressive night. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the flashlight reveals the rough texture of the ground and the immediate proximity of the flanking undergrowth. The scene remains enclosed by towering trees that loom in the deep darkness beyond the light's reach, ensuring the environment feels intimate and isolated.
